---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? (e.g. "I can't do X when Y happens")

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you have in mind.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you considered and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, or examples from other projects that do something similar.
